title: lastreopsis calantha
intro: Lastreopsis calantha, also known as Calanthe fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the subtropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastreopsis calantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Lastreopsis calantha typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
